summary: The implementation successfully addresses all four requirements (REQ-28 through REQ-31) with both backend and frontend components for AI-powered automatic clip generation. The backend function exists, the hook is implemented using React Query, the button is integrated into VideoUrlForm, and App.tsx manages the generated suggestions state. However, the backend implementation returns an empty array and relies on frontend mock data instead of actual AI analysis logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend function generates 3-5 clip suggestions per video based on video analysis logic
missing_requirements.reason: The backend function generateClipsAutomatically exists but returns an empty array. The actual clip generation logic (3-5 suggestions with unique titles and viral scores) is implemented as mock data in the frontend hook instead of the backend
